skills.name: commit
skills.description: Generate commit messages following conventional commits and commit staged changes. Use when creating commits or when user invokes /commit.

skills.name: implement-plan
skills.description: Execute approved implementation plans from scratchpad. Use when implementing a previously planned feature.

skills.name: pr-comments
skills.description: Triage unresolved PR review comments, produce a severity-ordered fix plan, then resolve or fix each issue with subagents. Use when addressing PR feedback before merge.

skills.name: pr-summary
skills.description: Create a PR with dev as base using the pull request template. Use when opening a new PR.

skills.name: react-patterns
skills.description: Write React components with minimal state, proper memoization, and type-safe patterns. Use when creating components, managing state, or optimizing renders.

skills.name: skill-creator
skills.description: Guide for creating effective skills. This skill should be used when users want to create a new skill (or update an existing skill) that extends Claude's capabilities with specialized knowledge, workflows, or tool integrations.
